# Rebuild Credit After Bankruptcy -- Step-by-Step [2026]
> How to rebuild your credit score after bankruptcy. Secured cards, credit-builder loans, and proven strategies. Free 2026 step-by-step rec...

## About
rebuildcreditafterbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
